take_a_moment_find_your_peace: Take a moment. Find your peace.
this_exercise_helps_you_practi: This exercise helps you practice redirecting your focus gently. Choose what feels right for you today.
take_your_time_there_s_no_rush: Take your time. There's no rush—just gentle focus.
no_pressure_no_worries_you_sho: No pressure, no worries. You showed up, and that matters. Come back whenever you're ready.
for_one_minute_give_yourself_p: For one minute, give yourself permission to just be.
feeling_restless_that_s_okay_y: Feeling restless? That's okay. You can pause anytime.
just_be_still_you_re_doing_gre: Just be still. You're doing great. 💙
these_are_common_ocd_experienc: These are common OCD experiences. Sorting them helps build awareness—there are no "right" or "wrong" answers, just gentle practice.
tap_a_card_then_tap_where_it_b: Tap a card, then tap where it belongs
